discovery.label: Job Discovery
discovery.description: Scrapes 50+ job board queries across LinkedIn, Lever, Greenhouse, Comeet, Ashby and more.

dedup.label: Dedup & Categorize
dedup.description: Removes duplicate listings and categorizes by DevOps, AI/ML, FinOps, etc.

customerMatch.label: Customer Matching
customerMatch.description: Matches companies against Develeap's 123 current and 32 past customer accounts.

enrichment.label: Contact Enrichment
enrichment.description: Enriches stakeholder contacts with verified emails, phones, titles via Apollo.io.

crmSync.label: CRM Sync
crmSync.description: Syncs company/deal/contact data from HubSpot every 2 hours during business hours.

review.label: Review & Select
review.description: User reviews new listings, selects contacts for outreach, picks message templates.

throttle.label: Queue & Throttle
throttle.description: Queues outreach messages with human-like timing to avoid LinkedIn detection and spam.

outreach.label: LinkedIn Outreach
outreach.description: Sends connection requests and personalized messages via LinkedIn with throttled delivery.

followUp.label: Follow-up Sequences
followUp.description: Automated Soap Opera Sequences: Day 0 → Day 3 → Day 7 → Day 14 follow-ups.

responseTracking.label: Response Tracking
responseTracking.description: Track responses, mark connections, qualify leads, update outreach statuses.

crmUpdate.label: CRM Update
crmUpdate.description: Logs outreach activity back to HubSpot — deals, contacts, engagement timeline.

conservative.label: Conservative
conservative.description: Safe for new accounts. Low volume, high delays.

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.description: Balanced approach. Good for established accounts.

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: High volume. Only for well-established accounts with Sales Navigator.

smart.label: Smart (Recommended)
smart.description: Auto-adjusts based on account activity and LinkedIn response signals.
